data.title: GREEN: Update sprint/SKILL.md to handle MAX_AGENTS unlimited|N|0 protocol
data.description:
## Description

Update plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md to handle the 3-tier MAX_AGENTS protocol:
- MAX_AGENTS: unlimited → dispatch all candidates with no artificial ceiling (no --limit flag or --limit=unlimited)
- MAX_AGENTS: N → cap batch at N (pass --limit=N)
- MAX_AGENTS: 0 → skip dispatch entirely, write ticket comment with utilization percentages and reset time

Replace all references to "5 sub-agents", "batch of 5", "MAX_AGENTS: 1 | 5" with protocol-aware language.

### File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No references to "5 sub-agents" or "MAX_AGENTS: 1 | 5" in sprint/SKILL.md
  Verify: ! grep -q "5 sub-agents\|MAX_AGENTS: 1 | 5\|MAX_AGENTS: 5" plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] Skill eval passes after update
  Verify: .claude/scripts/dso run-skill-evals.sh plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] All existing tests still pass
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
